fault_hypothesis: The fault is on line 61. The conflict detection logic incorrectly uses inclusive comparisons (`<=`, `>=`), which fails to identify adjacent time windows that touch at their boundaries as conflicts.

spec.expr: not any(b__1 == s or a__1 == e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: A new booking window must not touch the start or end boundary of any existing booking.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: If a booking is accepted, the resulting timeline must be strictly ordered with no touching intervals.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) or all(b__1 < s or a__1 > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If the booking is considered non-conflicting by the current logic, it must also be non-conflicting by the stricter (correct) logic.
